sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39403" key="e)pi/qalyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-θαλψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n39403.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">warming</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δακτύλων</foreign> prob. in Paul.
